name: CityGolf Boston
about: CityGolf Boston is an indoor golf training facility and simulator center with locations in Boston and Norwell, MA. The venue provides year-round access to PGA-certified golf instruction using advanced BoGolf simulators, offering visual aids and immediate swing feedback. Membership packages include unlimited lessons and simulator use, with a claimed 30% average handicap reduction for annual members. The facility also offers a full golf shop for retail sales, junior programs, and simulator sales and installation services.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited PGA lessons included in memberships
Advanced BoGolf simulators with immediate feedback
Year-round access to golf training and simulator play
Junior programs available with PGA Junior League competition
Multiple tech brands including Trackman and Uneekor

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for instruction with visual aids

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental options, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, and there's no explicit BYOB policy stated on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify timing for 18 holes, but typical simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, CityGolf offers dedicated junior golf programs for children ages 7-17, including a 4-week training program and participation in the PGA Junior League.
